prs.title: Adding support of MOES/Tuya Zigbee AM25 Tubular Motor for motorized roller blinds and window shades (_TZE200_nv6nxo0c / TS0601)
Addition of Garage Door Controller and combined Fan on/off, fan speed, Light on/off drivers.

aiSummary:
# Universal Tuya Zigbee GitHub Activity Summary

## New Device Requests
1. **Smart Switch (TYZGTH1CH-D1RF)**  
   - **User:** rpre  
   - **New Fingerprint:** `_TZ3000_xxxxx`  
   - **Existing Fingerprints:** `_TZ3218_7fiyo3kv` (switch_temp_sensor)  
   - **Issue Link:** [#1329](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1329)

## Existing Fingerprints Supported
- **Plug Energy Monitor**  
  - `_TZ3210_w0qqde0g`
  - `_TZ3210_xzhnra8x`
- **Community Contributions (14 new fingerprints)**  
  - `_TZ3000_iktiy8ue` (plug_energy_monitor)
  - `_TZ3000_cziew6eu` (switch_wall_6gang)
  - `_TZE204_d2zfgtij`, `_TZE284_d2zfgtij`, `_TZE200_d2zfgtij` (energy_meter_3phase)
  - `_TZE204_wjk6rurm`, `_TZE284_wjk6rurm`, `_TZE200_wjk6rurm` (power_meter)
  - Additional fingerprints for energy meters: `_TZE204_s4sa1mcx`, `_TZE284_s4sa1mcx`, `_TZE200_s4sa1mcx`, `_TZE204_x8diwkqb`, `_TZE284_x8diwkqb`, `_TZE200_x8diwkqb`  
  - **Issue Link:** [#142](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/142)

## Fingerprints from Forks to Integrate
- No new fingerprints from forks were identified in the recent activity.

## Pull Requests with Useful Changes
1. **PR #45** - Update driver.compose.json  
   - **User:** vl14-dev  
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZE200_nv6nxo0c`  
   - **Status:** Merged  
   - **Link:** [PR #45](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/45)

2. **PR #46** - Adding support for MOES/Tuya Zigbee AM25 Tubular Motor  
   - **User:** vl14-dev  
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZE200_nv6nxo0c`  
   - **Status:** Closed, not merged  
   - **Link:** [PR #46](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/46)

3. **PR #1253** - Added 3 new devices  
   - **User:** Peter-Celica  
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZE200_pay2byax`, `_TZ3000_mrpevh8p`  
   - **Status:** Open  
   - **Link:** [PR #1253](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1253)

4. **PR #1219** - Update driver.compose.json  
   - **User:** Melectro1  
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZ3000_gjrubzje`  
   - **Status:** Open  
   - **Link:** [PR #1219](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1219)

5. **PR #1218** - Update driver.compose.json  
   - **User:** Melectro1  
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZE204_dapwryy7`  
   - **Status:** Open  
   - **Link:** [PR #1218](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1218)

6. **PR #1195** - Add `_TZE204_bjzrowv2` - Update app.json  
   - **User:** YuriEstevan  
   - **Fingerprints:** `_TZE204_bjzrowv2`

7. **PR #1210** - Addition of Garage Door Controller and combined Fan drivers  
   - **User:** TKGHill

8. **PR #1292** - Added radar & illuminance sensor

   - **Link:** [PR #1292](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1292)

This summary encapsulates the latest developments in the Universal Tuya Zigbee repository, highlighting new requests, existing support, and valuable contributions from the community.
